title: Ecbolium bojeri
intro: Ecbolium bojeri, a flowering plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae, is a native species found in the tropical regions of the world. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Ecbolium bojeri include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Ecbolium bojeri is commonly prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and is often used to treat colds, coughs, and sore throats, as well as to promote respiratory health and alleviate fever.
